title: The Straw Hats Reach Egghead
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Franky, Unknown person #11, Atlas, Unknown person #12, Kid as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! A hamburger meal and a drink came out!! Who made it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Press the next one! Press the next one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, at least you appreciate my work. That's the Unmanned cooking device!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can turn raw ingredients into one of 500 unique dishes in under a minute!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "Make do with what you've got" mode is the best,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I can't be too happy since a lack of competent engineers means that this bucket of bolts can't be mass produced! Is following the blueprints that damn hard?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Island Aircon is in the same damn boat! Its sensors can monitor living creatures...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and it could tame the weather if we just had a bit more money!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are endless ideas, but not enough resources!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course! My photonic gloves make it possible to physically interact with light.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Perception shapes your sense of reality...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....but touching a projected object turns that on its head, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hm? So that girl isn't real?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Debates on what makes something real are as old as time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's something you'll have to decide for yourself, but I consider the matter settled!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What the hell?! That's a total lie!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're vegapunk?! I've heard that name!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
